_note: Provider/model configuration shape, shared by both apps. The API key is never stored here; it lives in the OS secret store (macOS Keychain / Windows Credential Manager via safeStorage or keyring).

apiProvider.description: Which remote backend to use. openAI talks to api.openai.com with fixed models; liteLLM talks to the configured gateway.

openAI._note: Fixed for the openAI provider; models are not user-editable there.

baseURL.description: Gateway base URL WITHOUT the /v1 suffix. http and https are both allowed.

apiKey.storage: OS secret store, not in settings file
